'''Dorlar''' was a [[Brubb]] [[Instructor/Legends|instructor]] at the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Dorlar met [[Myo/Legends|Myo]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. A friendly individual and generous with drinks, Dorlar soon became Myo's friend. Dorlar then convinced Myo to join the GOSS staff as a desert assistant, replacing a recently-lost instructor.<ref name="AIR" />
